chapter_title: Permits for Oversize or Overweight Vehicles
text: The Department of Public Safety shall have authority to enforce the provisions of this subchapter.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 623. Permits for Oversize or Overweight Vehicles
##### § 623.238 — Enforcement

The Department of Public Safety shall have authority to enforce the provisions of this subchapter.

*Added by Acts 2003, 78th Leg., ch. 786, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 2003.*

subsections.text: The Department of Public Safety shall have authority to enforce the provisions of this subchapter.

history.raw: Added by Acts 2003, 78th Leg., ch. 786, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 2003.
